from: Col. Hélder Sampaio, MMC (Engineering & Mining Liaison)
introBody: Pilot. Sampaio. Phobos desk, Engineering & Mining.
Cowboys handler vouched. Recorded. Mars line logged. Enough to open the door — not enough to hand you keys.
1. Mount is first. No turret, no Corps board access. Engineering bay on Mars — B at the terminal.
2. You work our giver lines, not tourist runs. MMC board only.
3. Stack builds in order. Each op unlocks the next. Do not skip the sequence.
4. Finish clean: double pay on Mars-issued work, manifold certification filed. Map opens Phobos fast travel — M to navigate.
Tap Accept or Decline. No follow-up from me either way.

steps.subject: OP 1 — TURRET MOUNT, ENGINEERING CERT
flavor: Pilot. Turret mount before anything else. Engineering bay, Mars spaceport — B at the terminal. No mount, no Corps board access. File already shows green? Good. We keep moving.

steps.subject: OP 2 — TURRET LIVE, MMC BOARD
flavor: Mount is live. Now use it. Pull one mining run off the MMC board — giver line reads Martian Marine Corps. Not a tourist run. Come back with a clean receipt.

steps.subject: OP 3 — CARGO BAY, TIER III
flavor: Drill-grade work needs drill-grade capacity. Cargo bay to tier three. No room in the hold, no room in the cohort.

steps.subject: OP 4 — CARGO PROOF, MARS RUN
flavor: Bigger hold means nothing without a receipt. One Mars-posted mining mission. Full load. Clean close.

steps.subject: OP 5 — FOCUS ARRAY, TIER III
flavor: Focus array to tier three. Beam goes where you put it. Belt debris is not a suggestion. Install and prove it.

steps.subject: OP 6 — FOCUS ARRAY, FIELD PROOF
flavor: Array is installed. Now earn it. One clean Mars mining closeout with the tuned beam. Hardware is nothing without receipts.

steps.subject: OP 7 — COOLING LOOP, TIER III
flavor: Cooling to tier three. Cook your emitter in a hot zone, you are a beacon for every pirate board from here to Kuiper. Install. Test. Fly.

steps.subject: OP 8 — COOLING LOOP, FIELD PROOF
flavor: Emitter stays cold under load or it does not count. One Mars mining run. Come back intact.

steps.subject: OP 9 — POWER REGULATOR, TIER III
flavor: Regulator to tier three. Discipline in the bus, discipline in the tank. Last hardware box. Do not get clever.

steps.subject: OP 10 — MANIFOLD QUALIFICATION RUN
flavor: Final evolution. Full stack. One Mars mining mission, clean close. Deliver and I sign the cohort file. Deploy the lander with F if the target needs surface work.

completionBody: Pilot. Good work. Cohort is yours.
MMC ledger shows you cleared every op in sequence. Double pay on Mars-issued work is live. Manifold certification filed — ride the posted corridors, do not guess the line. Phobos is on your map now.
You are a contractor the Corps can use. Keep the hull in one piece.
